base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mansion_maps — a tile from 1996 resident evil. Spencer Mansion floor-maps (1F, 2F, 3F) + Guardhouse + Underground Lab. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Spencer Mansion floor-maps (1F, 2F, 3F) + Guardhouse + Underground Lab
